args.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer AS kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    LOWER(administrativ_enhet) = 'drammen';

args.sql:
SELECT
    k.kommunenummer AS kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(k.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k
JOIN
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.administrativenhetnavn a
    ON k.kommunenummer = a.kommune_fk
WHERE
    LOWER(a.navn) = 'drammen' AND a.sprak = 'nor';

1.sql:
SELECT
    k.kommunenummer AS kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(k.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k
JOIN
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.administrativenhetnavn a
    ON k.kommunenummer = a.kommune_fk
WHERE
    LOWER(a.navn) = 'drammen' AND a.sprak = 'nor';

1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality geometry using kommunenummer

2.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality

3.description: Fetch buildings in Drammen intersecting flood zones

4.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard zones intersecting Drammen municipality

5.description: Join buildings with nearest quick-clay hazard zones and compute distance

6.description: Sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending

args.sql:
WITH drammen_buildings AS (
    SELECT
        bygningsid,
        ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
    FROM
        matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
    WHERE
        kommunenummer = '3301'
)
SELECT
    b.bygningsid,
    b.geom_geojson
FROM
    drammen_buildings b
JOIN
    step_2_geometries f
ON
    ST_Intersects(ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(b.geom_geojson), 4326), 25833), ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(f.geom_geojson), 4326), 25833));
